species: Up to 30% of patients with trisomy 21 develop transient abnormal myelopoiesis (TAM)
disease_state: we report that posttranscriptional repression of the transcription factor ARID3A by miR-125b is a key event in the pathogenesis of acute megakaryoblastic leukemia (AMKL).
sample_source: restoring ARID3A expression relieves the arrest of megakaryocytic differentiation in AMKL patient-derived xenografts.
anatomic_site_tumor: accompanied by marked splenomegaly and blast infiltration of the spleen and liver.
cell_line: we probed the ARID3A protein interaction network through Co-IP of ARID3A in the ML-DS cell line CMK...
strain: upon transplantation into syngeneic C57BL/6J recipients...
